caption: A man wearing a white baseball cap, large over-ear headphones, and a black hoodie with "BOSS TALK" printed in gold and white on the chest sits in a studio setting. He is positioned behind a dark brown desk with a professional microphone on a boom arm positioned in front of him. The background consists of a white backdrop featuring a repeated logo with five stars and the words "UNION HUSTLE" and "Where BOSSES Talk!". A red and white "BOSS TALK" logo is also visible on the wall and as an overlay in the bottom left corner. On the desk, there is a black container with a red label that reads "BOSS TALK OUT HERE". Throughout the sequence, the man remains in a seated position, looking slightly to his left with a serious expression, his mouth slightly open as if speaking. There is very little movement between the frames.
